species: we assess the resilience of the gut ecosystem to osmotic perturbation at multiple length and time scales using mice as model hosts.
disease_state: Mild osmotic diarrhea alters microbiota composition.
sample_source: We employed a humanized microbiota mouse model to determine how osmotic diarrhea impacts gut microbiota composition...
age: All animals were 6–12 weeks of age, both genders were used...
cell_line: the third member we selected was Bacteroides thetaiotaomicron (Bt), a well-characterized representative of the Bacteroidaceae family...
